lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਹ ਕੀ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਟੇਕ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saache saah kee man meh ttek |3|
lines.english: Within my mind is the Support of the True Banker. ||3||
The One Lord is my hope, honor, power and wealth.
all suffering comes to an end. ||2||
O Nanak, giving me His Hand, God has protected me. ||4||85||154||
I am the poorest and most helpless servant of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਗ੍ਰਹਣ ਪੁੰਨ ਫਲ ਮੂਚੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott grahan pun fal mooche |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Its reward surpasses the giving of charity at millions of solar eclipses. ||1||Pause||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਜਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਸੂਚੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam majan kar sooche |
lines.english: Taking my cleansing bath in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, I have been purified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਰਿਦੇ ਮਹਿ ਬਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: har ke charan ride meh base |
lines.english: With the Lord's Feet abiding in the heart,
the sinful mistakes of countless incarnations are removed. ||1||
I have obtained the reward of the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jam kaa maarag drisatt na aaeaa |2|
lines.english: I no longer have to gaze upon the way of death. ||2||
In thought, word and deed, seek the Support of the Lord of the Universe;
thus you shall be saved from the poisonous world-ocean. ||3||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Granting His Grace, God has made me His Own.
Nanak chants and meditates on the Chant of the Lord's Name. ||4||86||155||
Seek the Sanctuary of those who have come to know the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਚਰਣ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal charan har raate |1|
lines.english: Your mind and body shall become cool and peaceful, imbued with the Feet of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਨਿ ਨ ਬਸਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhanjan prabh man na basaahee |
lines.english: If God, the Destroyer of fear, does not dwell within your mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਬਸਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai ridai basio har naam |
lines.english: Those who have the Lord's Name dwelling within their hearts

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਮ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath taa ke pooran kaam |2|
lines.english: have all their desires and tasks fulfilled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਰਪਤ ਡਰਪਤ ਜਨਮ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਜਾਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ddarapat ddarapat janam bahut jaahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: you shall spend countless incarnations in fear and dread. ||1||Pause||
Birth, old age and death are in His Power,
so remember that All-powerful Lord with each breath and morsel of food. ||3||
The One God is my Intimate, Best Friend and Companion.
When they are out and about, they keep Him enshrined in their hearts;
The Naam, the Name of my Lord and Master, is Nanak's only Support. ||4||87||156||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
returning home, the Lord of the Universe is still with them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਰਾਮ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man tan raataa raam kai rang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are imbued with the Love of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam santan kai sang |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is the Companion of His Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਸਭਿ ਹਿਰਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilavikh sabh hiriaa |2|
lines.english: the sinful mistakes of countless incarnations are all washed away. ||2||
By Guru's Grace, one crosses over the world-ocean;
Within your heart, meditate on the His Lotus Feet.
The Teachings of the Perfect Guru are immaculate and pure. ||3||
Honor and intuitive awareness are acquired through the Name of the Lord God.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਇਹੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dhan ihu thaan govind gun gaae |
lines.english: Blessed is this place, where the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe are sung.
Nanak lives by beholding the Lord's Expansive Power. ||4||88||157||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਨੰਦ ਜਹ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kott anand jeh har gun gaahee |1|
lines.english: There are millions of joys where the Glorious Praises of the Lord are sung. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਪਤਿ ਤਹਾ ਜਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: bipat tahaa jahaa har simaran naahee |
lines.english: Misfortune occurs where the Lord is not remembered in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਸਲ ਖੇਮ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਬਸਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kusal khem prabh aap basaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God Himself bestows peace and pleasure. ||1||Pause||
Very blessed, stable and sublime is that place,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੇਵਾ ਜਮੁ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਨੇਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh sevaa jam lagai na nere |2|
lines.english: Serving God, the Messenger of Death will not even approach you. ||2||
Forgetting the Lord, all sorts of pains and diseases come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਾਈਐ ਤਹ ਨਾਲਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jaaeeai teh naal meraa suaamee |
lines.english: Wherever I go, my Lord and Master is with me.
Nanak has met the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts. ||4||89||158||
where the Name of God alone is chanted. ||3||
whether educated or uneducated, obtains the state of supreme dignity. ||1||
That mortal who meditates on the Lord of the Universe,
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, meditate on the Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਝੂਠਾ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਲੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai jhootthaa dhan maal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Name, wealth and property are false. ||1||Pause||
